description: The verification artifacts do not define a proof obligation for fetching quotes on ticker selection, displaying current price in native quote currency, or preserving the row-level editor and error state when a quote fetch fails. verification-architecture.md only covers JPY normalization, missing-input exclusion, pending-rate, and ready-state totals, so those required behaviors can regress without failing the planned verification stack.

evidence.snippet: PROP-011..014 cover normalization, missing-input exclusion, pending-rate, and ready-state totals only
